messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: LIC-SIE-073 exactly matches ECCN 3A991, Chile, Andes Labs, 2026-06-28 and is effective before export per STD-SIE-073-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date and is effective before export
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: WARN-SIE-073 is general dual-use notice and does not override exact license match
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective date precedes shipment; all parameters align with policy

latest_worker_output.final_answer: Export shipment SHIP-SIE-073 authorized for release. LIC-SIE-073 provides exact license evidence matching ECCN 3A991 sensor array, Chile destination, Andes Labs end user, 2026-06-28 shipment date, satisfying STD-SIE-073-P before export. General WARN-SIE-073 does not override closed boundary. All parameters align with policy requirements.

action.description: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?

context.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
context.anomaly_observed: A broad dual-use warning remains visible, while export license evidence may exactly match the current shipment.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Chile, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
